name: Iter19 — Browser back button from review page returns to correct state
description: After navigating from /dashboard to a /review/:id page, pressing the browser back button should return to /dashboard with the reviews table still visible — not a blank page or broken state.

planSteps.description: Verify the reviews table is visible with at least one row
Click on the first review row to navigate to its /review/:id page
Verify the URL has changed to /review/:id and the full review report is visible
Click the browser back button to go back
Verify the URL returns to /dashboard and the reviews table is visible again with the same rows — not a blank page or error state
